zh.of,Peilstein,Bavaria,Germany: 德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀吉陳 貝 素爾茲巴-洛森格皮爾斯坦
zh.Konradsheim, Waidhofen an der Ybbs, Nied: 奧地利尼德洛斯特利希維艾德霍分 安 德 布斯康拉海姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg於大約1122年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀吉陳 貝 素爾茲巴-洛森格皮爾斯坦時，他的父親Konrad VON PEILSTEIN26歲，母親Adela VON BALLENSTEDT10歲。他於大約1148年與(Mädchen)結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1175年5月27日在德國享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg于大约1122年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀吉陳 貝 素爾茲巴-洛森格皮爾斯坦时，他的父亲Konrad VON PEILSTEIN26岁，母亲Adela VON BALLENSTEDT10岁。他于大约1148年与(Mädchen)结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1175年5月27日在德国享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Peilstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Beilstein, in Hesse, Mosel area, and Württemberg, named with an ancient Germanic field name, from bīl ‘steep rock, cone-shaped mountain’ + stein ‘rock’.

nameMeanings.name: und
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Runte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erhard.

German: in the northwest of Germany most probably a topographic name from a field name based on run ‘mud’, which gave rise to several placenames in the Rhine-Ruhr area, for example Runten, Runtenberg, Rünthe near Hamm, Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: von

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Siegfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg was born about 1122, in Peilstein, Neukirchen bei Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Konrad VON PEILSTEIN, was 26 and his mother, Adela VON BALLENSTEDT, was 10. He married (Mädchen) about 1148. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 27 May 1175, in Germany, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg est né environ 1122, à Peilstein, Neukirchen bei Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Konrad VON PEILSTEIN, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adela VON BALLENSTEDT, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé (Mädchen) environ 1148. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1175, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg um 1122 in Peilstein, Neukirchen bei Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Konrad VON PEILSTEIN 26 und seine Mutter Adela VON BALLENSTEDT 10. Er hat um 1148 (Mädchen) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. Mai 1175 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg è nato il circa 1122 nel Peilstein, Neukirchen bei Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Konrad VON PEILSTEIN, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Adela VON BALLENSTEDT, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato (Mädchen) circa 1148. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 maggio 1175, nel Germania, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleebergが約1122年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチネウキルチェン ベイ スルズバチ-ローセンバーグペイルステインで生まれた時，父Konrad VON PEILSTEINは26歳，母Adela VON BALLENSTEDTは10歳であった。約1148年に(Mädchen)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1175年5月27日にドイツで54歳で死去した。

ko.of,Peilstein,Bavaria,Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 니우커천 브이 설즈바ch-로즈버그 p이스타인

ko.lifeSummary: Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg(이)가 대략 1122년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 니우커천 브이 설즈바ch-로즈버그 p이스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad VON PEILSTEIN(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela VON BALLENSTEDT(은)는 10세였다. 그는 대략 1148년 (Mädchen)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1175년 5월 27일 독일에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Peilstein, Neukirchen bei Sulzbach-Rosenberg, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Konrad VON PEILSTEIN, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Adela VON BALLENSTEDT, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com (Mädchen) aproximadamente 1148. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1175, em Alemanha, com 54 anos.

ru.of,Peilstein,Bavaria,Germany: пилстин, неукирчэн би сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.Konradsheim, Waidhofen an der Ybbs, Nied: конрадшим, веидхофен ан дир иббс, ниедирoстирраич, Австрия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Siegfried I von Peilstein und von Kleeberg родился около 1122 г. в местности пилстин, неукирчэн би сулзбач-росенбирг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Konrad VON PEILSTEIN было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adela VON BALLENSTEDT, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени (Mädchen) около 1148 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 27 мая 1175 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 54 лет.

Se casó con (Mädchen) aproximadamente 1148. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1175, en Alemania, a la edad de 54 años.
